prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约9728→9718→7406→6484→6240，整体呈明显上升趋势（位次数字减小），近4年累计前移约3488名；2025年基准约6240名，较2024年前移约244名；本省物理类计划2021年20人、2022年19人、2023年17人、2024年20人、2025年23人；2026年计划仅11人，较2025年大幅缩招约52%，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流、国防七子之一；软科主榜排名持续上升（2021年50→2026年43），近年排名稳步提升，学校综合实力与认可度增强；声誉评价平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度排名第27（较热），综合热度约171.7万，短视频平台曝光度处于中上水平，对报考关注度有一定正向作用；控制科学与工程为A级学科（全国顶尖），与自动化类、机器人工程、人工智能等招生专业高度关联；船舶与海洋工程、核工程与核技术等为学校传统优势方向，对工科考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化、计算机类等专业社会热度高热推荐，自动化类热度偏热；本省2026年考生总数约26.79万，较2025年（约25.23万）增加约6.2%，物理类考生估算约20.4万，竞争略有加剧；省控线2025年物理类本科批441分，近年波动不大；哈尔滨工程大学位于黑龙江省，距福建省较远，地域偏好上福建考生更倾向省内及南方高校，但该校国防七子品牌及工科实力对全国考生有跨区域吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年物理类计划大幅缩招（-52%）是影响位次的最关键因素，按供需弹性计算位次应显著后移（更容易进）；但本省考生总数增加约6.2%及学校排名持续上升、专业热度偏高等因素形成一定对冲。，考虑考生规模扩大与学校热度上升，小幅上调50名，预测最低位次约4337名，区间3837–4837名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 9728 → 9718 → 7406 → 6484 → 6240, showing a clear upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3488 places in the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is about 6240, a forward shift of about 244 places compared to 2024; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 20 in 2021, 19 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 11, a significant reduction of about 52% compared to 2025, greatly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class, one of the Seven Sons of National Defense; the Soft Science main ranking has been rising (50 in 2021 → 43 in 2026), with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength and recognition; reputation evaluation is stable, with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps; Douyin popularity ranking is 27th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.717 million, indicating mid-to-high exposure on short video platforms, which has a positive effect on application interest; Control Science and Engineering is an A-level discipline (top in the country), highly related to enrollment majors such as Automation, Robotics Engineering, and Artificial Intelligence; Ship and Ocean Engineering, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology are traditional advantageous directions, strongly attracting engineering students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Computer Science and other majors are highly recommended with high social popularity, Automation is relatively hot; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 267,900, an increase of about 6.2% compared to 2025 (about 252,300), with an estimated 204,000 Physics Category examinees, slightly intensifying competition; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 441 points, with little fluctuation in recent years; Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Fujian Province, and geographically Fujian examinees prefer provincial and southern universities, but the university's Seven Sons of National Defense brand and engineering strength have cross-regional appeal to national examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (-52%) is the most critical factor affecting rankings, according to supply-demand elasticity, the ranking should significantly shift backward (easier to enter); however, the increase in provincial examinees by about 6.2% and the continuous rise in the university's ranking and high major popularity create some offset. Considering the expansion of the examinee pool and increased school popularity, a slight upward adjustment of 50 places is made, predicting a minimum ranking of about 4337, with a range of 3837–4837.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Automation (including Automation, Robotics Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence, and 8 other majors)
- Communication Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, and 6 other majors)
- Ship and Ocean Engineering (Qian Xuesen Class)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Energy and Power Engineering (Xinghai Leading Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology (broad category, including Nuclear Chemical Engineering, Materials, Chemical Engineering, New Energy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3837–4837, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 3800), focus on aiming for top majors like the Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology Leading Class and Automation; if the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 4800), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2839 → 2561 → 3204, with significant fluctuations in the past three years. In 2025, the ranking moved back by about 643 places compared to 2024 (easier to enter), with a baseline of approximately 3204. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 3 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 14, a substantial expansion of about 133% compared to 2025, significantly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class, one of the Seven Sons of National Defense; ranked 43rd on the Soft Science main list, with a continuous upward trend in recent years, indicating enhanced comprehensive strength. Reputation evaluation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranks 27th (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 1.717 million, moderate exposure. Control Science and Engineering is A-level, but as a science and engineering university, the History Category majors (Business Administration, English, Sociology, Law) have low correlation with its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity but with clear differentiation; Business Administration is clearly discouraged; English/foreign languages are generally neutral. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 267,900, with History Category examinees estimated at about 64,000, an increase of about 6.3% compared to 2025 (about 60,300), slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 450 points, with little fluctuation in recent years. Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Fujian Province. As a science and engineering university, its cross-provincial appeal to History Category examinees is relatively limited, requiring more students to fill after expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Overall, the substantial expansion of the History Category plan in 2026 (+133%) is the most critical factor. According to supply-demand elasticity, the ranking should significantly move back (easier to enter). However, the increase in History Category examinees in the province by about 6.3% and the rise in university ranking form a slight offset. Considering the expansion of examinee numbers and the limited appeal of liberal arts at a science and engineering university, a slight downward adjustment of 30 places is made, predicting a minimum ranking of approximately 5737, with a range of 5237–6237.
